transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation Line, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a referral to a cardiologist. My doctor said she'd send one over but I haven't heard anything.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can look into that. Can I get your name and date of birth please?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Reyes, born March 4th, 1972. I should mention I've had chest pain and shortness of breath the last couple days, that's kind of why I need this.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thank you Daniel. I see a referral request from Dr. Whitfield dated last Tuesday, but it looks like it's still pending insurance verification.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay. How long does that usually take?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Typically three to five business days. I can push it through as a priority request so it moves faster.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would help. The chest pain's been kind of scary, honestly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, referrals can be stressful when you're waiting. I've flagged this as priority, so you should get a call from Dr. Alden's cardiology office within two business days to schedule.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, thank you. Should I do anything else in the meantime?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just keep an eye on your email for the confirmation, and give us a call back if you don't hear from their office by Thursday.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, I will. Thanks for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Daniel. Have a good rest of your day.
